title: Listening - Part 4: People Who Moved Abroad for a New Experience
description: You will hear five short extracts in which people talking about their experiences moving to different countries for new opportunities and adventures. You must complete two tasks while listening.

content.audio_script: Speaker 1: I've always been fascinated by Asian culture, so when the opportunity arose to work in Tokyo, I couldn’t resist. It was [21]a chance to immerse myself in a completely different environment[/21], which I found incredibly appealing. Although [26]it can sometimes be quite a challenge to communicate fluently[/26], especially in professional settings, the experience has been invaluable. The daily exposure to new perspectives has profoundly changed my way of thinking. || Speaker 2: Moving to Italy was a dream come true for me. The rich history and warm people were a major draw. What motivated me most was [22]the opportunity to study art restoration in a country renowned for it[/22]. Living here has given me a deep appreciation for life's simple pleasures, something I might have overlooked back home. However, [27]adapting to this slower pace of life took some time[/27], and occasionally, I find myself impatient. || Speaker 3: My decision to relocate to New Zealand stemmed from [23]a desire for adventure and the breathtaking natural landscapes the country offers[/23]. The lifestyle here is focused on the outdoors, which is exactly what I wanted. Yet, [28]the initial feeling of homesickness was unexpectedly intense[/28]. It’s been rewarding, though, to make connections with locals who share my passion for exploring nature. || Speaker 4: I moved to Germany last year for work, enticed by [24]a job offer in a cutting-edge technology firm[/24]. The efficiency and attention to detail in both work and daily life here are quite impressive. Nonetheless, [29]the language barrier was tougher to overcome than I anticipated[/29], but I’m persevering. What I cherish most is how this experience has pushed me out of my comfort zone and into a more multifaceted career. || Speaker 5: Australia attracted me due to [25]its reputation for a vibrant cultural scene[/25], and I've been able to dive headfirst into the music industry here. The community is so welcoming, making it easier to integrate. Although, [30]being away from my close-knit family has been the hardest part[/30]. The ability to express myself creatively and contribute to the thriving cultural landscape makes up for it significantly.

task1.title: Task One
task1.instruction: For questions 21–25, choose from the list (A–H) why each speaker decided to make a change.

questions.speaker: Speaker 1
questions.explanation: Speaker 1 was motivated by the opportunity to experience a different environment.

questions.speaker: Speaker 2
questions.explanation: Speaker 2 wanted to study art restoration in a renowned place.

questions.speaker: Speaker 3
questions.explanation: Speaker 3 sought adventure and stunning landscapes.

questions.speaker: Speaker 4
questions.explanation: Speaker 4 was drawn by a job offer in a tech firm.

questions.speaker: Speaker 5
questions.explanation: Speaker 5 was attracted by the cultural scene in Australia.

options.A: To immerse in a vibrant cultural scene
options.B: To seek adventure and natural beauty
options.D: To accept a job in a tech firm
options.E: To experience a completely different environment

task2.title: Task Two
task2.instruction: For questions 26–30, choose from the list (A–H) what each speaker finds most rewarding about their new life.

questions.speaker: Speaker 1
questions.explanation: Speaker 1 values the fresh perspectives gained.

questions.speaker: Speaker 2
questions.explanation: Speaker 2 appreciates the simple pleasures of life.

questions.speaker: Speaker 3
questions.explanation: Speaker 3 treasures connections with locals sharing a love for nature exploration.

questions.speaker: Speaker 4
questions.explanation: Speaker 4 finds stepping out of comfort zone rewarding.

questions.speaker: Speaker 5
questions.explanation: Speaker 5 values contributing to the cultural landscape.
